title: Nike Dri-FIT Men's Training T-Shirt
description: Lightweight and breathable training t-shirt designed with Dri-FIT technology to keep you cool and dry during intense workouts. Features a modern athletic fit and soft fabric for all-day comfort.

title: Adidas Men's Essentials 3-Stripes Shorts
description: Classic athletic shorts with signature 3-stripes design. Made from moisture-absorbing fabric, these shorts provide comfort and flexibility for training or casual wear.

title: Under Armour Men's Charged Assert Running Shoes
description: Versatile running shoes with responsive cushioning and lightweight mesh upper for breathability. Ideal for both daily runs and gym workouts.

title: Puma Men's Zip-Up Training Hoodie
description: Comfortable and stylish hoodie with full zip closure and soft fleece lining. Perfect for warming up, cooling down, or everyday wear.

title: Reebok Men's CrossFit Nano Training Shoes
description: Durable training shoes built for high-intensity workouts. Provides excellent stability, grip, and support for weightlifting and cross-training.

title: New Balance Men's Performance Joggers
description: Soft and flexible joggers designed for both performance and comfort. Features tapered fit, elastic waistband, and moisture-wicking fabric.
